HomePage.title: Welcome
HomePage.description: Get started by editing this page.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage your team members and their permissions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your application preferences and configuration.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: Track and manage your organization's expenses.

Auth.googlePwaNote: Google sign-in may open in your browser

AuthDialog.title: Create an account or log in
AuthDialog.description: Log in to place your order. Your cart will be saved.

Checkout.title: Checkout
Checkout.specialInstructions: Any special instructions for your order...
Checkout.cartEmptyDesc: Add some items before checking out.
Checkout.signInDesc: Sign in to place your order. Your cart will be saved.
Checkout.storeClosed: The store is currently closed. You cannot place orders at this time.
Checkout.tapToSelectAddress: Tap to select a delivery address

OrderConfirmation.declinedDesc: Unfortunately, the store was unable to accept your order. Please try again or contact the store.
OrderConfirmation.orderComplete: Your order is complete! Thank you.
OrderConfirmation.waitingForStore: Waiting for the store to accept...
OrderConfirmation.readyForPickup: Your order is ready for pickup!
OrderConfirmation.readyForDelivery: Your order is ready and will be delivered soon!
OrderConfirmation.outForDelivery: Your order is on its way!
OrderConfirmation.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
OrderConfirmation.cancelError: Failed to cancel order. Please try again.

OrderHistory.title: Order History
OrderHistory.noOrdersDesc: Your order history will appear here once you place an order.
OrderHistory.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
OrderHistory.cancelError: Failed to cancel order. Please try again.

ProfilePrompt.title: Complete your profile
ProfilePrompt.description: Add your name and phone number for a faster checkout experience.

LocationPrompt.title: Tell us where you are
LocationPrompt.description: Help us confirm availability and delivery fees.
LocationPrompt.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
LocationPrompt.locationDenied: Location access denied. Please enter your address manually.
LocationPrompt.locationUnavailable: Location unavailable. Please enter your address manually.
LocationPrompt.locationError: Could not get location. Please enter your address manually.

Pwa.getFullExperience: Get the full experience — install the app
Pwa.appInstalled: You already have the app installed
Pwa.iosTip: Tap the Share button in Safari, then tap Add to Home Screen.
Pwa.androidTip: Open this page in Chrome or Safari on your phone and tap Add to Home Screen.
